Key distinguishing features of the target:
- The filled cells (X's) are all on the RIGHT side

content.text: Expression: Three filled columns aligned to the right edge with two empty columns on the left

clem_player.response: Expression: Three filled columns aligned to the right edge with two empty columns on the left
